description: Maintenance scheduling and visit management with auto-generated visit dates, holiday avoidance, calendar events, and warranty status tracking for customer equipment.

visit_dates_auto_generated.description: Visit dates are auto-generated based on the periodicity setting (Weekly, Monthly, Quarterly, Half Yearly, Yearly, or Random).

holiday_avoidance.description: Generated visit dates avoid company holidays. If a calculated date falls on a holiday, it is shifted to the previous working day.

serial_number_validation.description: Serial numbers specified in schedule items are validated against the item and checked for warranty status.

calendar_events_per_visit.description: Calendar events are created for each scheduled visit, assigned to the designated sales person or service person.

visit_updates_schedule.description: Completing a maintenance visit updates the corresponding schedule detail record with the actual completion date and status.

warranty_status_update.description: Warranty claim status and AMC expiry date are updated on the serial number based on visit completion.

cannot_cancel_with_later_visits.description: A maintenance visit cannot be cancelled if later visits in the same schedule already exist and are completed.

amc_expiry_update.description: AMC (Annual Maintenance Contract) expiry date is updated on the serial number record upon schedule submission.

given: customer, company, and items with date ranges and periodicity are provided
date range is sufficient for at least one visit

then.description: Visit dates generated based on periodicity and holiday calendar

generate_schedule.result: Maintenance schedule generated with visit dates

given: at least one visit date is generated
submit_schedule.result: Schedule submitted and locked for execution

then.description: Calendar events created for each scheduled visit

create_calendar_events.result: Calendar events created and assigned to service personnel

given: purposes with service_person and work_done are provided
record_visit.result: Maintenance visit recorded with work details

complete_visit.result: Visit marked complete and schedule updated

given: serial numbers are specified in visit purposes

then.description: Warranty/AMC status updated on serial number

update_warranty_status.result: Serial number warranty and AMC status updated

errors.message: No visits could be generated for the specified date range and periodicity.
The date range is too short to generate visits with the specified periodicity.
The specified serial number is still under active warranty.
Cannot cancel this visit because later visits in the schedule are already completed.
The visit date falls outside the maintenance schedule date range.

events.name: schedule.generated
events.description: Fired when maintenance schedule visit dates are generated

events.name: schedule.submitted
events.description: Fired when a maintenance schedule is submitted

events.name: visit.completed
events.description: Fired when a maintenance visit is completed

events.name: visit.cancelled
events.description: Fired when a maintenance visit is cancelled

events.name: warranty.status_updated
events.description: Fired when warranty status is updated from a visit

related.reason: Serial numbers validated for warranty and AMC status
Customer data used for schedule and visit management
Breakdown visits may link to support tickets

goals.description: Maintenance scheduling and visit management with auto-generated visit dates, holiday avoidance, calendar events, and warranty status tracking for customer equipment.

success_metrics.measurement: All decisions have complete audit trails

constraints.description: All operations must be auditable and traceable

tradeoffs.reason: quality checks must be comprehensive to catch defects early
